en: Hello guys and welcome to NECA native English for kids and adults. Well today I
bring you another English expression and the expression for today is can't stomach
it. Can't stomach it. Can't stomach it simply means not able to put up or
tolerate something. So in one word can't stomach it means you hate something. As
in I can't stomach it when people ignore me while I'm talking. I don't think
anybody does. So whenever you're talking so nobody likes being ignored by anybody.
So if I'm talking then you should listen. I can't stomach it when people watch my
video and do not subscribe. So thank you so much for watching and do not forget
to subscribe because I can't stomach it.
